bits.name: EFUSE_ALL0_CHECK_START
bits.comment: write 1 to this bit will trigger all0 check to efuse, this bit is self-clear ,read this bit will always get 0.(use PREADY)

bits.name: CLK_EFS_DIV
bits.comment: Clk_efs divider, if this value is n, the frequency of controller will be divided by (n+1) from clk_efs. In most case, this field not need to change.

bits.name: EFUSE_STROBE_LOW_WIDTH
bits.comment: This counter is used to control STROBE signal low level width in PGM mode, for TSMC efuse memory, no extra requirement for this signal, For 26Mhz efuse controller clock, by default, this width will be: 38.4*28=1075ns > 1us. If you want to speed up program speed, can configure the register to a smaller value.

bits.name: TPGM_TIME_CNT
bits.comment: Program strobe high time. If set n, the Tpgm time will last for (n+1) clk_efuse cycle, only when PGM_EN=1 can write this field.

bits.name: SEC_LOCK_BIT_WR_EN
bits.comment: If set the bit, lock bits will be written after PGM process.

bits.name: SEC_ALL0_CHECK_FLAG
bits.comment: the bit indicates all 0 check fail.

bits.name: SEC_ENK_ERR_FLAG
bits.comment: the bit enk1 and enk2 is not switch correctly.

bits.name: SEC_MAGNUM_WR_FLAG
bits.comment: the bit indicates write process without setting magic number.

bits.name: SEC_BLOCK0_RD_FLAG
bits.comment: the bit indicates arbiter read block0 which may indicates unexpected access.

bits.name: SEC_VDD_ON_RD_FLAG
bits.comment: the bit indicates read process without setting vdd_on to 1.

bits.name: SEC_PG_EN_WR_FLAG
bits.comment: the bit indicates write process without setting pg_en to 1.

bits.name: SEC_WORD1_PROT_FLAG
bits.comment: The bit indicates shadow block is protected and can not be programmed if double_bit_en is set. If SW send a PGM command to memory block[i], and the controller found this memory block is protected(which means the highest bit is 1), this bit will set to 1.

bits.name: SEC_WORD0_PROT_FLAG
bits.comment: The bit indicates block auto check failed after programming. If PGM_AUTO_CHK_EN is set, and controller compared the value read after PGM from the same block, and found the two value not match, this bit will set as an error flag. But if this block is protected, the PGM command in-fact not really send, so this bit will not set.

bits.name: shadow_block_auto_check_failed
bits.comment: The bit indicates shadow block auto check failed after programming if double_bit_en is set. If PGM_AUTO_CHK_EN is set, and controller compared the value read after PGM from the same block, and found the two value not match, this bit will set as an error flag. But if this block is protected, the PGM command in-fact not really send, so this bit will not set.

bits.name: block_auto_check_failed
bits.comment: The bit indicates block auto check failed after programming. If PGM_AUTO_CHK_EN is set, and controller compared the value read after PGM from the same block, and found the two value not match, this bit will set as an error flag. But if this block is protected, the PGM command in-fact not really send, so this bit will not set.

bits.name: SEC_WORD1_PROT_CLR
bits.comment: write 1 will clear SEC_WORD1_PROT_FLAG. Write 0 will do nothing.

bits.name: SEC_WORD0_PROT_CLR
bits.comment: write 1 will clear SEC_WORD0_PROT_FLAG. Write 0 will do nothing.

bits.name: SEC_WORD1_ERR_CLR
bits.comment: write 1 will clear SEC_WORD1_ERR_FLAG. Write 0 will do nothing.

bits.name: SEC_WORD0_ERR_CLR
bits.comment: write 1 will clear SEC_WORD0_ERR_FLAG. Write 0 will do nothing.

bits.name: SEC_EFUSE_MAGIC_NUMBER
ACCESS_PROT
bits.comment: 0: SEC access; 1: NON SEC address enable switch

bits.name: CONF_PROT
SAR_READ_BITS
bits.comment: Read bits index for SAR mode

bits.name: ANLG_CFG_EFUSE_SAR_READ_MODE
bits.comment: read mode, 1'b1: sar mode; 1'b0: normal mode

bits.name: NS_S_PG_EN
bits.comment: set this bit will open static power supply for efuse memory, before any operation towards to efuse memory this bit have to set to 1. once this bit is cleared, the efuse will go to power down mose.

bits.name: EFS_ENK2_ON
bits.comment: VDDQ power switch K2, to safely control this power switch.

bits.name: EFS_ENK1_ON
bits.comment: VDDQ power switch K2, to safely control this power switch.

bits.name: efuse_func_en_0
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_1
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_2
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_3
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_4
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_5
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_6
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_7
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_8
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_9
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_10
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_11
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_12
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_13
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_14
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_func_en_15
bits.comment: write once register, security function control bit: 0 = disabled 1 = enabled

bits.name: efuse_bist_en
bits.comment: efuse bist enable, write once register

bits.name: efuse_block0_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block0 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block0 1 = enable read/write efuse block0

bits.name: efuse_block1_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block1 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block1 1 = enable read/write efuse block1

bits.name: efuse_block2_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block2 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block2 1 = enable read/write efuse block2

bits.name: efuse_block3_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block3 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block3 1 = enable read/write efuse block3

bits.name: efuse_block4_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block4 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block4 1 = enable read/write efuse block4

bits.name: efuse_block5_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block5 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block5 1 = enable read/write efuse block5

bits.name: efuse_block6_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block6 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block6 1 = enable read/write efuse block6

bits.name: efuse_block7_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block7 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block7 1 = enable read/write efuse block7

bits.name: efuse_block8_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block8 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block8 1 = enable read/write efuse block8

bits.name: efuse_block9_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block9 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block9 1 = enable read/write efuse block9

bits.name: efuse_block10_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block10 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block10 1 = enable read/write efuse block10

bits.name: efuse_block11_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block11 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block11 1 = enable read/write efuse block11

bits.name: efuse_block12_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block12 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block12 1 = enable read/write efuse block12

bits.name: efuse_block13_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block13 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block13 1 = enable read/write efuse block13

bits.name: efuse_block14_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block14 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block14 1 = enable read/write efuse block14

bits.name: efuse_block15_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block15 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block15 1 = enable read/write efuse block15

bits.name: efuse_block16_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block16 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block16 1 = enable read/write efuse block16

bits.name: efuse_block17_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block17 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block17 1 = enable read/write efuse block17

bits.name: efuse_block18_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block18 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block18 1 = enable read/write efuse block18

bits.name: efuse_block19_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block19 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block19 1 = enable read/write efuse block19

bits.name: efuse_block20_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block20 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block20 1 = enable read/write efuse block20

bits.name: efuse_block21_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block21 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block21 1 = enable read/write efuse block21

bits.name: efuse_block22_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block22 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block22 1 = enable read/write efuse block22

bits.name: efuse_block23_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block23 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block23 1 = enable read/write efuse block23

bits.name: efuse_block24_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block24 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block24 1 = enable read/write efuse block24

bits.name: efuse_block25_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block25 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block25 1 = enable read/write efuse block25

bits.name: efuse_block26_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block26 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block26 1 = enable read/write efuse block26

bits.name: efuse_block27_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block27 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block27 1 = enable read/write efuse block27

bits.name: efuse_block28_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block28 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block28 1 = enable read/write efuse block28

bits.name: efuse_block29_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block29 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block29 1 = enable read/write efuse block29

bits.name: efuse_block30_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block30 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block30 1 = enable read/write efuse block30

bits.name: efuse_block31_rw_ctrl
bits.comment: control efuse block31 read/write, write once register: 0 = not enable read/write efuse block31 1 = enable read/write efuse block31

bits.name: por_read_done
bits.comment: read config bits done status from efuse macro after por, then this bit is set to 1.

bits.name: EFUSE_DATA
bits.comment: the registers are the mapping address to efuse macro. Write the 12'hxxx address means burn the data into block (12'hxxx<<2) of efuse. Read the 12'hxxx address will get the block (12'hxxx<<2) data of efuse.
